title: hieracium macranthiforme
intro: Hieracium macranthiforme, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Hawkweed is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can be used both internally and topically to harness its medicinal properties.
